title: astragalus mollissimus var. coryi
intro: Astragalus mollissimus var. coryi, also known as Cory's milkvetch, is a perennial herb plant belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Astragalus mollissimus var. coryi can be prepared as a tea, extract, or supplement, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to support overall health and well-being.
